brief: US and Iran trade new strikes amid fragile truce; Trump uses old Air Force One in security swap. Australia signs major uranium deal with India, while Senate race in Maine shifts. AI impacts software rewrites and visualization research.
news_summary: US launches further airstrikes on Iran, which retaliates against Gulf states; Trump flies partway from Turkey on older plane due to security concerns. Australia and India ink uranium deal, and Graham Platner suspends Senate bid after rape accusation.
papers_summary: Research covers performance incentives in visualization, BCI clinical translation in China, compositional analysis of traditional Chinese paintings, and multimodal sign language recognition using deep learning.

en.brief: US and Iran trade new strikes amid fragile truce; Trump uses old Air Force One in security swap. Australia signs major uranium deal with India, while Senate race in Maine shifts. AI impacts software rewrites and visualization research.
en.news_summary: US launches further airstrikes on Iran, which retaliates against Gulf states; Trump flies partway from Turkey on older plane due to security concerns. Australia and India ink uranium deal, and Graham Platner suspends Senate bid after rape accusation.
en.papers_summary: Research covers performance incentives in visualization, BCI clinical translation in China, compositional analysis of traditional Chinese paintings, and multimodal sign language recognition using deep learning.

zh.brief: 今日關注美國華裔竊取UCLA古籍案、英國大選中英關係走向、台灣事後避孕藥管制爭議，以及美伊持續空襲。
zh.news_summary: 美國華裔男子因盜取UCLA中國古籍被判刑，英國首相熱門人選貝安德的中國政策受關注，中國網紅陳土豆在台灣爆紅引發統戰爭議，台灣擬管制事後避孕藥引女性焦慮，美伊互相空襲使談判前景脆弱。
zh.papers_summary: 今日無相關中文研究論文。

todays_image.caption: Uranium ore's slow, invisible decay mirrors the creeping loss of autonomy and vitality in a zombified society.
todays_image.title: Uranium ore
